title: [华仔的voxy汉化]Huazai's voxy module has been localized into Chinese
description: The original Voxy mod was not translated into Chinese, so I created a resource pack to enable Chinese players to also enjoy the high rendering of the Voxy mod.
body: The original Voxy was not translated into Chinese. So I created a Chinese version package to enable Chinese players to enjoy the high-quality and detailed rendering of Voxy to the fullest.
